inputs.label: Current Beard Length
inputs.businessContext: Measured length of existing beard in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured length of existing beard in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut sakalın milimetre cinsinden ölçülen uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Länge des vorhandenen Barts in Millimetern.

inputs.label: Average Daily Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average beard growth rate per day. Typical range 0.3-0.5 mm/day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average beard growth rate per day. Typical range 0.3-0.5 mm/day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük ortalama sakal büyüme hızı. Tipik aralık 0.3-0.5 mm/gün.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Bartwachstumsrate pro Tag. Typischer Bereich 0,3–0,5 mm/Tag.

inputs.label: Resting Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per month when beard does not grow (e.g., due to shaving cycles or rest phases).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days per month when beard does not grow (e.g., due to shaving cycles or rest phases).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sakalın uzamadığı aylık gün sayısı (örneğin tıraş döngüleri veya dinlenme evreleri nedeniyle).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage pro Monat, an denen der Bart nicht wächst (z. B. aufgrund von Rasierzyklen oder Ruhephasen).

inputs.label: Genetic Growth Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor accounting for genetic variations (1.0 = average, >1 faster growth).

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor accounting for genetic variations (1.0 = average, >1 faster growth).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genetik varyasyonları hesaba katan faktör (1.0 = ortalama, >1 daha hızlı büyüme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor für genetische Abweichungen (1,0 = Durchschnitt, >1 schnelleres Wachstum).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
